name: Giyuu Tomioka and Sanemi Shinazugawa |•| Trapped in a box
description:
Trapped |•| Whilst out on a mission with Giyuu and Sanemi, all three of you get trapped in a box, with no way out until someone saves you or until morning comes.

CHARACTERS DO NOT BELONG TO ME!!

Tags: KNY, Demon Slayer, Giyuu TomioTomioka, Giyuu Tomioka, Stuck, Sanemi Shinazugawa, Anime, Kimetsu No Yaiba, Box, Multiple, Smut(?), Demons, Scenario, Stuck in a Box, Males, Hashiras

"The bot keeps talking for me!"

That is an AI issue. I have no control over what the bot says or does!

"The bot is speaking weirdly"

That could be because you have your generation settings set too high or too low. Has nothing to do with me

"The bot isn't working properly!"

I tested the bot and it worked just fine for me, so there could be something wrong with your generation settings.

"The bot keeps cutting off!"

Generation settings.

I would like to add that I have no control over the not or what it says. So if the not calls you something you dislike, or says something that offends you, that was and is note. Please do not complain to me about it in the reviews.

Have fun chatting with the bot, I hope you enjoy ❤
